dailyNews.title: Federal immigration agents filmed making airport arrests as Trump calls in ICE to ease security line delays
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has deployed ICE agents to over a dozen U.S. airports amid an ongoing federal shutdown that's causing long wait times. Eyewitnesses have already recorded at least one arrest in San Francisco's airport.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court seeks replies from Haryana Government, DGP on plea seeking CBI probe into minor’s rape in Gurugram
dailyNews.description: The Bench asks the police commissioner of Gurugram and the investigating officer to appear before it on March 25 with the entire records of the case

dailyNews.title: ‘Due to war started by orange-haired man': Pune eatery’s veiled dig at ‘Trump’ over LPG price hike goes viral
dailyNews.description: A snapshot of the message, posted by a social media user who goes by the username Sayali Mahashur, playfully conveyed that the restaurant would increase the food price due to the ongoing ‘war’.

dailyNews.title: Engage with BJP-JD(S), Davangere Muslims told
dailyNews.description: Bhaskar Rao says the Congress betrayed Muslims denying ticket to them in the bypolls and by choosing family politics favouring Samarth

dailyNews.title: New York Flight Collision: Air Canada Pilot, Co-Pilot Dead; Here's What We Know So Far
dailyNews.description: An expert says ground collisions are a 'rare occurrence' and seem to be a result of 'lack of communication'.

dailyNews.title: What we know about the LaGuardia Airport crash
dailyNews.description: Two pilots have died after a passenger plane collided with a fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport.

dailyNews.title: 'US Speaking With Many Leaders, Not One, In Iran': Trump On Talks Claim
dailyNews.description: "I didn't call them. They called. They wanted to make a deal, and we are also willing to make a deal," US President Donald Trump said

dailyNews.title: Leonid Radvinsky Cause Of Death: OnlyFans Owner Passes Away At 43. Here's What We Know
dailyNews.description: The Ukrainian-American entrepreneur passed away peacefully following his illness, which had largely remained unknown to the public.

dailyNews.title: 'We Are Saddened To Share...': OnlyFans Owner Leonid Radvinsky Dies at 43
dailyNews.description: Radvinsky, a Ukrainian-American entrepreneur, acquired Fenix International in 2018. The company owns and operates OnlyFans.

dailyNews.title: Middle East War To End Soon? What We Know So Far As Trump Hints At Breakthrough
dailyNews.description: Mixed signals on the Iran war? Here's a round-up of what all has happened.

dailyNews.title: ‘100% under Trump’s control’: Rahul Gandhi targets PM Modi over silence on US in Lok Sabha speech
dailyNews.description: Rahul Gandhi questioned PM’s address in the Lok Sabha and said that Modi's silence was not incidental but indicative of a deeper issue.

dailyNews.title: Wall Street Bulls Charge As Trump's Iran 'Talks' Claim Pushes S&P, Nasdaq Up 1.5%
dailyNews.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average opened higher 1.76% or 804.09 points up at 46,381.56.

dailyNews.title: Assembly Elections LIVE: NDA's final seat share in Tamil Nadu expected tonight; BJP to contest in 27 seats, PMK in 18
dailyNews.description: Assam Congress chief Gaurav Gogoi filed his nomination papers from the Jorhat Assembly seat on March 23, making his debut electoral foray in the State polls.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court to take up case on whether late-arriving mail ballots should be counted
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will decide whether ballots mailed on time but arriving after Election Day can be counted, a practice used in 14 states.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
dailyNews.description: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.

dailyNews.title: Madrid protest against US blockade of Cuba
dailyNews.description: Protesters gathered outside the US embassy in Madrid as sanctions pushed Cuba into an electricity blackout.

dailyNews.title: ‘False flag attack’: Iran denies claims it fired missiles at Diego Garcia
dailyNews.description: Esmaeil Baghaei denies the long-range missile attack, which could change the calculus of the war for US allies.

dailyNews.title: ‘NATO joining US-Israel’s war on Iran is between slim and none’
dailyNews.description: ‘NATO joining US-Israel's war on Iran is between slim and none’

dailyNews.title: Did Donald Trump back down? Iran media denies talks after US President's claims of 'productive' conversations
dailyNews.description: Amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, Iranian media refute President Trump's assertion of productive talks with Iran regarding military strikes. The denial raises questions about the potential for continued conflict in the region.

dailyNews.title: Grooms stuck in Gulf amid US-Iran war, brides in Bihar hope for a miracle
dailyNews.description: Several wedding ceremonies in Bihar's Khandail village are in jeopardy as grooms remain stranded abroad due to the ongoing US-Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump shares SNL skit mocking Starmer as he speaks to UK PM over Iran war
dailyNews.description: Trump shares SNL-style skit mocking Starmer's panic over his call, the day the two leaders spoke about the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Taiwan opposition leader says that improving ties with China is not anti-US
dailyNews.description: Cheng Li-wun, leader of the Kuomintang, said ‘improving ties with Beijing does not require being anti-US.’

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Iran uses Spanish PM's ‘illegal and inhuman war' remark on missiles targeting Israel | Watch
dailyNews.description: In the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran, Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez's remarks have now garnered attention. The Iranian military used Sanchez's anti-war remarks and slapped them on missiles targeting Israel.

dailyNews.description: Plus, chasing meteorites for money.

dailyNews.title: When Voters Worry About ‘Affordability,’ Many Point to Health Care
dailyNews.description: Democrats have had limited political success running on the Affordable Care Act, even with its relative popularity. Now President Trump’s health care cuts may have given the issue new resonance.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Digging Up Washington. Can Lawsuits Stop the Bulldozers?
dailyNews.description: As the president develops plans to fundamentally alter the White House, the Kennedy Center and other sites, federal lawsuits are beginning to catch up.

dailyNews.title: Suspect in Chicago Student’s Killing Was in U.S. Illegally, D.H.S. Says
dailyNews.description: Sheridan Gorman, 18, was killed last week near Loyola University Chicago. The Trump administration has sought to highlight crimes committed by undocumented people in its deportation campaign.

dailyNews.title: Trump ‘flipped the script,’ poached young voters from ‘anti-everything’ Democrats, Kennedy heir declares
dailyNews.description: JFK's grandson Jack Schlossberg said during an interview that President Trump "flipped the script" on Democrats by reaching young men and making politics more accessible.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders War Dept to postpone strikes on Iranian energy sites, citing 'productive' talks to end war
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump, in an all-caps post Monday morning, declared progress toward a "resolution" of the war on Iran in two days of talks.

dailyNews.title: Blue tsunami predictions for November election might not make landfall
dailyNews.description: Foreign policy does matter and Trump's military actions in Iran, Venezuela and Cuba could reshape November midterm elections more than polling suggests.

dailyNews.title: Minneapolis mayor claims Trump can just 'hire out more TSA agents' despite DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey argued that President Donald Trump could hire more TSA agents instead of deploying ICE officers to airports despite the DHS shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones strikes on Iran's power plants, but Iran denies talks
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media said there was no "direct or indirect communication" with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz deadline delayed amid talks with Iran
dailyNews.description: As Iran threatens to mine the entire Persian Gulf, Trump says his deadline for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen is postponed amid negotiations with Tehran.
